creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Configuration Error (prefix s02): No LDAP Login Filter given!

This is the error message I get along with some weird login errors. I just upgraded to version 8.1.3.0 as available in the ports and just checked the configuration, when suddenly, out of the blue, the server refuses login via LDAP.

The same issue is true with fresh installations were I simply enabled the usage of OpenLDAP as backend as I did on the working systems before - but I get strange and somehow useless error messages about a missing filter an missing '%uid' set.

What the hell is going on here?
